calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Off Calendar

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeff Coons, via ZOOM, for Colleen Owyang, Petitioner; Woodford Rowland, via ZOOM, for Rodney Owyang, via ZOOM, Respondent.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of this matter. Mr. Coons reports that there have delays in receiving distribution due to the current Trustees inability to perform his duties. The court advises counsel that it is ordering the consolidation of this matter with the earlier case and moving forward, all papers are to be filed in that case. The court then queries counsel if there has been an agreement regarding a successor trustee. Mr. Rowland advises that he doesn't believe that an appointment of a successor trustee is required and that he and Mr. Coons have agreed that Mr. Rowland will file a supplement to the accounting that will hopefully resolve some of the unsettled issues. Mr. Coons advises that he has not agreed to the preceding and that specific distributions were made ten (10) years ago and of which his client received none. The court advises counsel that it is suspending the current trustee and ordering the appointment of T. Anne Lassahn to serve as interim successor trustee. The court also orders the parties to meet and confer and file a joint status report by no later than Oct-28-2021. Mr. Coons is instructed to submit an updated proposed order to the assigned Examiner via email.

The Verified Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is continued to Nov-08-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Status of Bond is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Brandon Slykhous. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeff Coons, via ZOOM, for Colleen Owyang, Petitioner; Woodford Rowland, via ZOOM, for Rodney Owyang, Successor Trustee.

The court begins by advising counsel that this matter should be consolidated with a related trust matter and advises Mr. Rowland to file the necessary papers with the court to do so. The court also confirms with Mr. Coons that a reply from his client to Mr. Owyang's petition is pending in the court's e-filing queue.

The Verified Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is continued to August 2, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Lazar, via ZOOM, counsel for Colleen Owyang, Petitioner; Woodford Rowland, via ZOOM, counsel for Rodney Owyang, Respondent.

At the outset, Mr. Rowland reports that he has just recently been retained as counsel by his client and advises that he had hoped to file an objection by today and requests a three-week continuance to do so. Mr. Lazar replies that the respondent has had 18 months to reply and that the attorney who previously represented him was non-compliant and requests to suspend the trustee and appoint an interim successor trustee. Mr. Lazar reports that he has provided a response to Examiner's notes and has an agreement from interim successor trustee to serve in that capacity.

After additional discussion, the Verified Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is continued to July 12, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Mr. Rowland is advised to have his objection filed by no later than June 28, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Continued To Apr-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Terminating Turst And Directing Distribution Of Assets
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue for Rodney Owyang.

The Court stated that there are a number of issues with this petition and that the most substantive one is that it does not know of any procedure to substitute the Clerk of the Court as a Trustee. Mr. Perdue stated that he does not know where else to put the funds, that they sent the check, that the check was not signed and that it was not returned. Mr. Perdue also stated that the check is now stale dated, that they still have an account with the funds in it and that the Trust will never close. The Court stated that what is being requested is not going to work. Mr. Perdue asked to take the matter off calendar and stated that he will try to figure what else to do. The Petition for Order Terminating Trust and Directing Distribution of Assets is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
